task.title: Fix publish workflow musl.cc timeout for aarch64 broker build

events.content: Replaced publish workflow aarch64 musl toolchain download from musl.cc with cross-rs: Replaced publish workflow aarch64 musl toolchain download from musl.cc with cross-rs

raw.question: Replaced publish workflow aarch64 musl toolchain download from musl.cc with cross-rs
raw.chosen: Replaced publish workflow aarch64 musl toolchain download from musl.cc with cross-rs
raw.reasoning: musl.cc timeouts cause recurring CI failures; cross uses maintained target container and avoids direct dependency on musl.cc

retrospective.summary: Patched publish.yml build-broker job to use cross for aarch64-unknown-linux-musl, removed musl.cc curl path, and enabled fail-fast=false for broker matrix
